history.content:
<thought>
I am on the left side of the map facing right. The goal `O` is in the lower-right area, and the cell immediately to my right is lava, so I should not move forward. Since the space below me is open, I will turn right to face downward and begin moving around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at the bottom-right area. I am facing down, so I should avoid the lava immediately ahead and instead start moving right through the open path. First I need to turn right to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am on the left side of the map facing left, with walls directly ahead. The goal is far to the right near the bottom, so I need to reorient to move into the open corridor. Turning right will face me upward? From left, a clockwise turn makes me face up, which is not useful; turning left makes me face down, also not useful. Since I cannot move forward into a wall, I should start turning toward a direction that lets me navigate around the lava. The best first step is to turn right toward upward? I need to align before moving.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal `O` is near the bottom-right, and I am at the top-left area facing up. The cell directly below me is a safe floor `.` (not lava), so the best first step is to face downward and start moving along the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side of the map facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is near the lower-right area, and the direct path to the right is blocked by lava, so I should move downward into the open corridor first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am on the left side of the map facing down, but the cell directly ahead is floor and the goal is far to the right in the bottom row. I should first turn right to face east so I can start moving along the open path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left at the upper-left area, and the immediate cell to my left is a wall, so moving forward would not help. The goal `O` is far to the lower-right, and the open path appears to be to the right along the top row, but since I am currently facing left, I need to turn around first. Turning right will start rotating me toward moving right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the upper-left area, facing up. The goal `O` is in the lower-right, and there is a clear floor path mostly along the left side and then across the lower area. Moving forward would hit a wall, so I should first turn right to face toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side of the map facing right. The goal `O` is far to the right and slightly below, but there are lava cells blocking the direct path. The safest immediate move is to go forward into the open cell to the right, keeping me aligned toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
